eventText: Before you make a Hunt roll, you may discard "Flocks of Crebain" to add 1 to all dice on that Hunt roll (including re-rolls).
eventDiscardCondition: You must discard this card from the table immediately if the Fellowship is declared in an unconquered Free Peoples City or Stronghold.
combatPreCondition: Play if the total Nazgûl Leadership is 1 or more.
combatText: Forfeit one point of Nazgûl Leadership to add 1 to all dice on your Leader re-roll.
